response:
here is a sample cover letter in all lowercase:

dear [hiring manager's name],

i am writing to express my interest in the [position] role at [company name]. i came across the job listing on [job board] and was excited to see that [company name] is looking for someone with my skills and experience.

with [number] years of experience in [industry/field], i possess a strong background in [key skills or qualifications]. my most recent position at [previous company] has given me the opportunity to develop my skills in [specific skills or areas of expertise]. i am confident that my expertise and passion for [industry/field] make me an ideal candidate for this role.

i am particularly drawn to [company name] because of its [reputation, mission, or values that resonate with you]. as someone who is [personal quality or trait], i am excited about the prospect of joining a team that shares my values and is committed to [related goal or initiative].

in addition to my skills and experience, i bring a strong work ethic and a willingness to learn and grow with the company. i am excited about the opportunity to contribute to [company name] and be a part of a team that is making a positive impact in [industry/field].

thank you for considering my application. i would be thrilled to discuss my qualifications further and explain in greater detail why i am the ideal candidate for this role. please feel free to contact me at [your contact information].

sincerely,
[your name]
